name: Independence Day
detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 1pm and 2pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny, with a high near 95. Heat index values as high as 98. Northwest wind around 9 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
